markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the central bank announces its decision.
markets.rules_primary: If the Bank of Russia takes the action of Maintain current rate at the April Bank of Russia Board of Directors’ key rate meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on the official policy rate decision announced by the central bank. For central banks with multiple policy rates, only changes to the primary policy rate count. If the meeting is cancelled or delayed past the expiration date, markets for "No change" resolve to Yes and all others resolve to No. Emergency rate changes between scheduled meetings do not affect resolution of contracts tied to scheduled meetings. The specific basis point ranges are inclusive (e.g., "25-50bp" includes both 25bp and 50bp changes).
markets.title: Will the Bank of Russia Maintain current rate at the April Bank of Russia Board of Directors’ key rate meeting?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the index administrator announces or implements the membership change.
markets.rules_primary: If The Trade Desk is announced to be or is officially removed from S&P 500 during April 1, 2026 to June 30, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves to Yes if either the index administrator officially announces the membership change OR the change takes effect during the specified time period, whichever occurs first. The effective date of the change need not fall within the time period; only the announcement or implementation must occur within the time period. Temporary suspensions do not constitute removal unless explicitly designated as permanent by the index administrator. If an announced addition or removal is subsequently reversed due to error within the time period, the Exchange will determine resolution at its discretion. For companies undergoing mergers, acquisitions, or restructuring, removal from the index due to such corporate actions constitutes removal for purposes of this market. If a spin-off or successor entity is immediately added in place of the original company, the original company is still considered removed. Regular scheduled rebalancing events count as additions or removals if the company's membership status changes during such rebalancing.
markets.title: Will The Trade Desk be removed from the S&P 500 in Q2 2026?

custom_strike.Bill: legislation that designates June 14, the birthday of President Donald J. Trump, as a legal public holiday for federal employees

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Trump's Birthday as a federal holiday
markets.rules_primary: If legislation that designates June 14, the birthday of President Donald J. Trump, as a legal public holiday for federal employees has become law before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
An example of this is H.R. 1395 (119th) — Trump's Birthday and Flag Day Holiday Establishment Act

The bill must pass the full chamber (not just committee) for House or Senate passage. For "become law" markets, the bill must be signed by the President or become law through veto override. Presidential pocket vetoes that expire resolve to No. Joint resolutions are treated as bills. Treaties require two-thirds Senate approval for passage. The market resolves based on the first occurrence of the specified milestone.
markets.title: Will legislation that designates June 14, the birthday of President Donald J. Trump, as a legal public holiday for federal employees become law before Jan 1, 2027?
markets.yes_sub_title: Trump's Birthday as a federal holiday

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the central bank announces its decision.
markets.rules_primary: If the Bank of England takes the action of Maintain current rate at the April Bank of England Monetary Policy Committee meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on the official policy rate decision announced by the central bank. For central banks with multiple policy rates, only changes to the primary policy rate count. If the meeting is cancelled or delayed past the expiration date, markets for "No change" resolve to Yes and all others resolve to No. Emergency rate changes between scheduled meetings do not affect resolution of contracts tied to scheduled meetings. The specific basis point ranges are inclusive (e.g., "25-50bp" includes both 25bp and 50bp changes).
markets.title: Will the Bank of England Maintain current rate at the April Bank of England Monetary Policy Committee meeting?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jack Black says Trump as part of Saturday Night Live opening monologue, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Saturday Night Live opening monologue will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Saturday Night Live opening monologue will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. 
Additional content not included in the original broadcast or stream will not count. 
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  
The event will resolve based on Jack Black speaking in an official capacity. If Jack Black is or is not present during a livestream, and does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if certified election results are published.
markets.rules_primary: If the margin of victory for Shawn Harris in the 2026 GA-14 special election runoff falls at least 0%, inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The margin of victory shall be calculated as follows based on the margin type.

For percentage points: the vote percentage received by Shawn Harris minus the vote percentage received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Shawn Harris if Shawn Harris wins, or the candidate/party that finishes first if Shawn Harris loses.
For raw votes: the total votes received by Shawn Harris minus the total votes received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Shawn Harris if Shawn Harris wins, or the candidate/party/option that finishes first if Shawn Harris loses.
For electoral votes: the electoral votes received by Shawn Harris minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the second-most electoral votes if Shawn Harris wins, or the electoral votes received by Shawn Harris minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the most electoral votes if Shawn Harris does not.

Each margin range is inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound. No rounding shall be applied to the calculated margin. For example, for consecutive ranges of 5-6% and 6-7%, a margin of 5.99999% resolves within the 5-6% range, while a margin of exactly 6% resolves within the 6-7% range. If Shawn Harris runs under multiple parties or is listed multiple times, votes attributable to the same underlying natural Shawn Harris will be summed.

If Shawn Harris wins the election, the margin will be positive. If Shawn Harris loses the election, the margin will be negative. If Shawn Harris ties for first place, the margin shall be 0. For uncontested races where Shawn Harris is the only candidate, the margin shall be 100 percentage points or the total number of votes cast (for raw votes).
markets.title: Will the margin of victory for Shawn Harris in the 2026 GA-14 special election runoff be above 0%?

The margin of victory shall be calculated as follows based on the margin type.

For percentage points: the vote percentage received by Clayton Fuller minus the vote percentage received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Clayton Fuller if Clayton Fuller wins, or the candidate/party that finishes first if Clayton Fuller loses.
For raw votes: the total votes received by Clayton Fuller minus the total votes received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Clayton Fuller if Clayton Fuller wins, or the candidate/party/option that finishes first if Clayton Fuller loses.
For electoral votes: the electoral votes received by Clayton Fuller minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the second-most electoral votes if Clayton Fuller wins, or the electoral votes received by Clayton Fuller minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the most electoral votes if Clayton Fuller does not.

Each margin range is inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound. No rounding shall be applied to the calculated margin. For example, for consecutive ranges of 5-6% and 6-7%, a margin of 5.99999% resolves within the 5-6% range, while a margin of exactly 6% resolves within the 6-7% range. If Clayton Fuller runs under multiple parties or is listed multiple times, votes attributable to the same underlying natural Clayton Fuller will be summed.

If Clayton Fuller wins the election, the margin will be positive. If Clayton Fuller loses the election, the margin will be negative. If Clayton Fuller ties for first place, the margin shall be 0. For uncontested races where Clayton Fuller is the only candidate, the margin shall be 100 percentage points or the total number of votes cast (for raw votes).
markets.title: Will the margin of victory for Clayton Fuller in the 2026 GA-14 special election runoff be between 0% and 5%?
